arts.ttl: 'Rules appear to change' - Mikel Arteta makes bizarre Arsenal claim despite Liverpool setback
arts.sum: Arsenal sit 11 points behind Liverpool in the Premier League table after they suffered another setback in their hopes of catching the Reds

arts.ttl: 'You will pay': Mohamed Salah shares what he tells opposition defenders when they try to 'trash talk' with him
Liverpool fans fear Mohamed Salah is saying goodbye in new interview as uncertainty over future continues
arts.sum: Liverpool fans think Mo Salah has hinted at that he will be leaving Anfield at the end of the season after he appeared to give somewhat of a farewell message in a new interview.

arts.ttl: Who will replace Arne Slot on touchline while Liverpool manager serves ban?
arts.sum: Liverpool manager Arne Slot and assistant Sipke Hulshoff will serve two-game touchline bans after receiving red cards against Everton.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United drop early Liverpool team news hint as Eddie Howe makes Alexander Isak claim
arts.sum: Newcastle United appear to have dropped an early team news hint ahead of their clash against Liverpool. He is another player who could be quite close.

arts.ttl: Liverpool to be managed by ex-Everton hero vs Newcastle after Arne Slot's extended FA ban
arts.sum: Liverpool boss Arne Slot will not be present for Newcastle's visit to Anfield after being handed a two-match ban following his actions following the game against Everton

arts.ttl: Everton and Liverpool hit with FA fines after derby chaos as Arne Slot and assistant banned
arts.sum: Everton and Liverpool have been fined while Arne Slot and his assistant Sipke Hulshoff will serve touchline bans

arts.ttl: FA release statement confirming Arne Slot Liverpool punishment with huge Newcastle United impact
arts.sum: A statement from the FA read : "Everton, Liverpool, Arne Slot and Sipke Hulshoff have been charged following the Premier League fixture between the clubs on Wednesday, 12 February. Slot will be back on the touchline for Liverpool's Champions League first leg trip to Paris Saint-Germain next Wednesday, before serving the second part of his two-game ban when the Reds take on Southampton in the Premier League on Saturday, March 8.

arts.ttl: Liverpool v Newcastle Betfair Offer: Boost Salah to 50/1 to Have Over 0.5 Shots on Target
arts.sum: Liverpool take on Newcastle in another round of Premier League fixtures tonight, as the Reds look to extend their gap at the top once more to 2nd placed Arsenal. Arne Slot looks set to win the Premie...

arts.ttl: Newcastle XI vs Liverpool – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Newcastle United make the trip to league-leading Liverpool in the Premier League this evening. The Magpies boosted their Champions League hopes with a thrilling 4-3 win over Nottingham Forest at the weekend. Eddie Howe’s side have won eight of their last 11 league games to move into contention for a top-four finish.
